---
title: "Day 1 - Arrival"
format: html
---

::: top-banner
:::

::: {.text-center}
# **San Cristobal, Galapagos, Ecuador**
### *June 8, 2026*
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
- **5:00 - 5:30 pm**  
  Transfer from **San Cristobal Airport (SCY)** to the hotel  
  *Transportation coordinated by Isaac and Dylan*

- **6:00 pm**  
  Hotel check-in  
  *Depending on your room assignment, please check your email for hotel instructions*  
  *Address: TBD*

- **7:30 - 9:00 pm**  
  Dinner and workshop objectives  
  *Location: TBD*
:::
